title: derris zambalensis
intro: Derris zambalensis, also known as the Zambalena or the Derris, is a type of plant in the pea family that is native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Derris zambalensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
